channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bed Bath & Beyond to the moon? Why the retailer is getting a major stock boost today, despite lack of profits
item.description: Shares of Bed Bath & Beyond Inc (NYSE: BBBY) are surging this morning, a day after the company reported its Q1 2026 results. Despite the company repor...

item.title: Trump’s Labor Secretary: We’re rewriting the rules on joint employment. Here’s what businesses need to know
item.description: This proposed rule would give employers — and employees — a clearer test for determining when two companies share legal responsibility for the same wo...

item.title: Trump’s ‘gold card’ visas were supposed to solve the $39 trillion national debt. They’ve only sold one
item.description: Gold card revenue "may be earmarked for deficit reduction, but it actually could be more money than that," Trump previously told reporters.

item.title: Why Office Seating Choice Can Boost Productivity by 2.5x
item.description: Experts say offices need five distinct spaces to support their team’s performance.
